_comment: Lumora rotating market state. Edit safely. Do not remove keys unless you know what you are doing.

_notes.announceOnRotate: If true, bot sends a rotation message.
_notes.showRareBanner: If true, market UI can show 🌟 RARE ITEM AVAILABLE 🌟 above rare/epic/legendary items.
_notes.rotationPoolSizes: How many items to pull from each pool when rotating.
_notes.limitedStockRule: Rare items should stay scarce. Common items can be plentiful.
_notes.marketSpeechMode: random means choose one speech from rotationSpeeches each refresh.

rotationPoolSizes._comment: Semi-random market size. Total visible items should feel lively but not crowded.

rotationSpeeches:
🏪 MARKET ROTATION

The merchant caravans of Lumora have refreshed their wares.
New curiosities now rest upon the stalls.
Some items are limited.

Use .market to see what is available.

🏪 MARKET ROTATION

The market bells ring once more across Lumora.
Fresh stock has arrived from wandering traders and hidden routes.
A few prized items may not last long.

Use .market to inspect today's wares.

🏪 MARKET ROTATION

Canvas tents rise, crates unlock, and the traders of Lumora begin again.
New goods are now circulating through the market.
Limited stock items may vanish quickly.

Use .market to browse the stalls.

🏪 MARKET ROTATION

Dust settles as another wave of merchants enters Lumora.
The stalls have changed, and rare goods may be hidden among the ordinary.

Use .market to view the new stock.

🏪 MARKET ROTATION

Fresh wares have replaced the old stock in Lumora's busy stalls.
Those who arrive first may claim the best finds.

Use .market to see what appeared.
blackMarketSpeeches:
⚫ BLACK MARKET WHISPERS

Shadows move through the alleys of Lumora tonight.
Forbidden traders have changed their stock again.
Some rare goods exist in very small numbers.

Use .market to investigate.

⚫ BLACK MARKET WHISPERS

Behind locked shutters and low voices, hidden merchants have refreshed their vaults.
Dangerous wares may already be changing hands.

Use .market to see what surfaced.

⚫ BLACK MARKET WHISPERS

A quiet signal spreads among smugglers and collectors.
The underground stock has shifted once more.
The rarest items may disappear without warning.

Use .market to inspect the changes.

stockRules._comment: Used when generating rotation stock if item stock is not manually overridden.

priceModifiers._comment: Lets you rebalance economy without editing every item in items.json.

subscriptions._comment: Bot can later mirror this into subscribers.json if you want. For now this section documents intent.

currentRotation.speechUsed:
🏪 MARKET ROTATION

The market bells ring once more across Lumora.
Fresh stock has arrived from wandering traders and hidden routes.
A few prized items may not last long.

Use .market to inspect today's wares.

forcedRotationPools._comment: Optional helper pools. Keep these if you want more control over what can show up.

marketUi.footer:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🛒 Use: `.buy <item name or id>`
🔔 Use `.subscribe-market` to receive market rotation alerts

futureIdeas._comment: Just notes for later so you remember where this file can grow.
